title: Secure underlay — drop-in OS replacement, guests inside protections
motto: Bottom up so nothing sits below us. Host OS runs as guest; we assist with vision and field.

model.underlay: KILROY Field Die + NEXUS shield + Queen capsule — native authority
model.guest: Incumbent OS (Linux/Windows/macOS) — POSIX/ABI passthrough, no trust
model.assist: Final_Eye vision + Final_Ear + AI integration — tasks inside protections
model.bottom_up: BIOS witness → Grok boot → Field Die → hooks → guest never owns syscall truth

passthrough_modes.windows_guest: QEMU/KVM or future Field capsule — NEXUS gatekeeper on wire
passthrough_modes.macos_guest: ABI bridge planned — protections on network + vision assist today
passthrough_modes.browser_legacy: Queen secure cage — old JS isolated from OS/memory

assist_stack.role: Human and pet lifeform truth_id sustain

nobody_below.rule: Incumbent kernel is substrate guest — Field Die owns syscall classification
